overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking along elevated industrial structures in a stormy harbor district at night. The scene features gothic industrial architecture, neon signage, and heavy rain over the water.

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the elevated platform overlooking the industrial harbor and cranes

entered.detail: ornate dark metal framework with curved architectural details
large cargo cranes silhouetted against the stormy sky
dark water visible below the industrial platforms
illuminated signage reading DENT on a distant building
tall red and white lighthouse visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on an elevated industrial catwalk overlooking a stormy harbor. Gothic metal architecture frames the left side while large cargo cranes rise on the right. The DENT sign glows in the distance across the water, and a lighthouse is barely visible on the horizon through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed metal walkway with curved structural beams

events.description: enters enclosed curved metal corridor with gothic architectural beams

agents.ego_description: Batman walking through the enclosed curved corridor with metal beams arching overhead

entered.detail: large curved structural beams forming an enclosed tunnel-like passage
narrow passage with metal walls and overhead covering

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into an enclosed metal walkway with large curved beams arching overhead. The harbor view is temporarily obscured as Batman moves through this narrow, sheltering corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial rooftop with neon signage and lighthouse view

events.description: exits enclosed walkway onto open industrial platform with clear view of lighthouse
camera turns left revealing neon-lit industrial complex with large digital billboard

agents.ego_description: Batman continues along the walkway, surveying the industrial district before turning toward the main complex with neon signage

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial structures with gothic architecture
illuminated advertising screen showing colorful imagery
red and white neon lights on building facades
atmospheric smoke rising from industrial vents

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed walkway, the scene opens onto a wide industrial rooftop with the lighthouse now prominent ahead. As Batman continues, the camera turns left to reveal a sprawling industrial complex illuminated by neon signs and a large digital billboard, with atmospheric smoke drifting through the rainy night air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open industrial overlook through a sheltered corridor and out onto a sprawling, neon-lit rooftop. It begins on an elevated catwalk overlooking a stormy harbor, where gothic metal architecture and cargo cranes frame a distant, glowing DENT sign and a faint lighthouse. As Batman advances, the view of the harbor is temporarily obscured as the camera moves into an enclosed metal walkway characterized by large, arching beams. The scene then opens up again as the camera emerges from the corridor onto a wide industrial rooftop with the lighthouse now prominent ahead. Finally, the perspective turns left to reveal a vast industrial complex illuminated by digital billboards and neon signs, with atmospheric smoke drifting through the heavy rain.
